title: Swinburne, Kay - Parliamentary Under Secretary of State in the Department for Levelling Up, Housing and Communities - ACOBA Advice
body: "Baroness Dr Swinburne left her role at the Department for Levelling Up, Housing and Communities in July 2024.  Independent Consultancy and commissions Baroness Dr Swinburne sought the Committee’s advice about setting up an independent consultancy, operating as Swinburne Ltd. An accessible version of the letter is available here. and taking on a commission with:    7RIDGE Ltd. An accessible version of the letter is available here.   Euroclear Group SA. An accessible version of the letter is available here.    Independent Chair, Association of British Insurers Baroness Dr Swinburne sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with the Association of British Insurers. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in March 2025; and the appointment was taken up in April 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
